job_description: We are looking for a motivated Junior Software Engineer to join our growing engineering team. In this role you will develop and maintain backend services using Python and Java, collaborate with senior engineers on system design, and write clean well-documented code. You will work with RESTful APIs, relational databases such as PostgreSQL, and version control using Git. Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies is expected. This is a great opportunity to grow your skills in a fast-paced product company. Prior internship or project experience with Python and SQL is required.

We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer to lead development of our core platform services. You will architect and implement scalable microservices using Java and Spring Boot, mentor junior developers, and participate in code reviews. Strong expertise in distributed systems, REST APIs, and Kubernetes is essential. Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure is highly desirable. You will collaborate closely with product managers and DevOps teams to ship features reliably. 5+ years of professional software development experience required.

Join our analytics team as a Data Scientist and help drive data-informed decision-making across the business. You will build predictive models using Python, scikit-learn, and TensorFlow, and work with large datasets stored in Snowflake and S3. Responsibilities include feature engineering, model evaluation, A/B testing, and presenting insights to stakeholders. Strong knowledge of statistics, regression, classification, and clustering algorithms is required. Experience with SQL and Pandas for data wrangling is essential. You will collaborate with data engineers to productionize models via MLflow.

We are hiring a Machine Learning Engineer to build and deploy ML systems at scale. You will design end-to-end ML pipelines, train deep learning models using PyTorch and TensorFlow, and deploy them via REST APIs on AWS SageMaker. Experience with MLOps practices, model versioning, and monitoring model drift is required. Strong Python skills and familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes for containerized deployments are essential. You will work closely with data scientists to translate research prototypes into production-ready systems. 3+ years of ML engineering experience preferred.

Our platform team is looking for a skilled DevOps Engineer to manage and improve our CI/CD infrastructure. You will design and maintain deployment pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and ArgoCD, and manage containerized workloads on Kubernetes. Strong experience with AWS services including EC2, EKS, RDS, and S3 is required. You will write infrastructure-as-code using Terraform and Ansible, monitor system health with Prometheus and Grafana, and respond to on-call incidents. A solid understanding of Linux system administration and networking fundamentals is expected. 3+ years of DevOps or SRE experience needed.

We are looking for a Full Stack Web Developer to build and maintain our customer-facing web applications. You will develop responsive frontends using React and TypeScript, and build robust backend APIs using Node.js and Express. Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis for data storage and caching is required. Familiarity with Docker for local development and CI/CD pipelines for deployment is a plus. You will collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement pixel-perfect interfaces and ensure cross-browser compatibility. A strong portfolio demonstrating full-stack projects is highly valued.

We are seeking a Cyber Security Analyst to protect our organization's digital assets and infrastructure. You will monitor security events using SIEM tools such as Splunk and IBM QRadar, perform vulnerability assessments, and respond to security incidents. Strong knowledge of network security protocols, firewalls, IDS/IPS systems, and OWASP top 10 is required. Experience with penetration testing tools such as Metasploit and Burp Suite is a plus. You will conduct security audits, develop threat models, and ensure compliance with ISO 27001 and GDPR frameworks. CEH or CISSP certification is preferred.

We are hiring a Cloud Engineer to design and manage our multi-cloud infrastructure. You will deploy and optimize workloads across AWS and Azure, implement auto-scaling architectures, and enforce cloud security best practices. Proficiency in Terraform for infrastructure provisioning and Python or Bash scripting for automation is required. Experience with managed Kubernetes services such as EKS and AKS, and cloud networking concepts including VPCs, subnets, and load balancers is essential. You will work with development teams to optimize cloud costs and reliability. AWS Solutions Architect or Azure Administrator certification is preferred.

We are looking for a Business Analyst to bridge the gap between our business stakeholders and technical teams. You will gather and document business requirements, create detailed functional specifications, and facilitate workshops with cross-functional teams. Proficiency in SQL for data analysis, and tools like JIRA and Confluence for project management is required. Experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau or Power BI to communicate insights is highly valued. You will analyze existing business processes, identify inefficiencies, and propose data-driven improvements. A background in IT or software product companies is strongly preferred.

We are seeking a Backend Software Engineer with strong expertise in building high-performance APIs and services. You will develop microservices in Go and Python, integrate with message brokers such as Apache Kafka, and design schemas for PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases. Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for containerization, and AWS for cloud deployment is required. You will participate in system design discussions, write comprehensive unit and integration tests, and maintain technical documentation. Knowledge of caching strategies using Redis and experience with gRPC are additional plusses. 3–5 years of backend development experience expected.

We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to lead analytics initiatives and mentor a team of analysts. You will develop advanced ML models for customer segmentation, churn prediction, and demand forecasting using Python, XGBoost, and deep learning frameworks. Strong experience with SQL, Spark, and cloud data platforms such as Databricks or BigQuery is required. You will define experiment design, perform statistical hypothesis testing, and present findings to C-level executives. Expertise in NLP techniques including text classification and named entity recognition is a bonus. 5+ years of data science experience in a commercial setting required.

We are hiring an NLP Engineer to develop natural language processing solutions for our AI products. You will fine-tune large language models using Hugging Face Transformers, build text classification and information extraction pipelines, and deploy models as scalable APIs on AWS. Deep understanding of BERT, GPT architectures, tokenization, and attention mechanisms is required. Experience with Python, PyTorch, and MLflow for experiment tracking is essential. You will collaborate with product teams to define NLP use cases and with data engineers to build robust training data pipelines. A background in computational linguistics or NLP research is a strong plus.

Our infrastructure team is looking for a Site Reliability Engineer to ensure the reliability and performance of our production systems. You will own SLA/SLO definitions, build observability stacks with Prometheus, Grafana, and OpenTelemetry, and automate operational tasks using Python and Bash. Deep knowledge of Kubernetes, Linux internals, and networking is required. Experience with incident management, post-mortem processes, and chaos engineering practices is highly valued. You will work closely with software engineers to improve system resilience and reduce toil. 4+ years of SRE or senior DevOps experience is expected.

We are seeking a talented Frontend Web Developer to craft exceptional user experiences for our SaaS platform. You will build performant, accessible web UIs using React, Next.js, and CSS-in-JS libraries such as Styled Components. Strong knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript, browser APIs, and web performance optimization techniques is required. Experience with GraphQL clients like Apollo, and state management using Redux or Zustand is a plus. You will collaborate with product designers using Figma and work within an Agile sprint cycle. A passion for pixel-perfect implementation and a strong eye for design detail are essential.

We are seeking a Cloud Security Engineer to safeguard our AWS and Azure infrastructure. You will design and implement security controls including IAM policies, security groups, network ACLs, and encryption at rest and in transit. Experience with cloud security frameworks such as CIS Benchmarks, AWS Well-Architected, and NIST is required. You will conduct threat modeling, perform cloud penetration tests, and respond to security alerts from AWS GuardDuty and Microsoft Defender. Strong scripting skills in Python or Bash for security automation are expected. CCSP or AWS Security Specialty certification is a strong advantage.

We are looking for a Junior Data Analyst to support our business intelligence team. You will extract and transform data using SQL and Python, build dashboards in Tableau and Power BI, and prepare reports for business stakeholders. Familiarity with Excel for ad-hoc analysis and basic understanding of statistics is required. You will work with senior analysts to define KPIs and data models, and help maintain our data warehouse on Snowflake. Strong communication skills and attention to detail are essential. This role is ideal for recent graduates with a quantitative background looking to launch their data career.

We are hiring a Platform Engineer to build and operate our internal developer platform. You will design self-service tooling for teams to provision infrastructure on AWS using Terraform and Pulumi, and manage our Kubernetes-based deployment platform. Experience with GitOps practices, ArgoCD, and Helm charts is required. You will define platform standards, write runbooks, and drive adoption of best practices across engineering teams. Proficiency in Go or Python for building internal tooling is expected. A passion for developer experience and reducing friction in software delivery is key to success in this role.

We are looking for a Machine Learning Research Engineer to advance our AI capabilities. You will conduct applied research in areas such as recommendation systems, anomaly detection, and computer vision using PyTorch and TensorFlow. You will implement and evaluate novel model architectures, run large-scale experiments on GPU clusters, and publish findings internally. Strong mathematical foundations in linear algebra, probability, and optimization are required. Experience with distributed training frameworks such as Horovod or DeepSpeed is a plus. You will collaborate with product engineers to transition research prototypes into production. A PhD or Master's in ML or related field is preferred.

We are seeking a combined Scrum Master and Business Analyst to support our digital transformation projects. You will facilitate daily standups, sprint planning, and retrospectives for cross-functional teams, and document business requirements and user stories in JIRA and Confluence. Proficiency in process modeling using BPMN and experience with stakeholder management are required. Familiarity with SQL for data queries and tools like Lucidchart for workflow diagrams is valued. You will help product owners prioritize backlogs and ensure alignment between business objectives and technical delivery. CSM or CSPO certification is a strong plus.

We are looking for an AWS Cloud Architect to design and govern our enterprise cloud strategy. You will create reference architectures for multi-account AWS environments, define standards for VPC design, IAM governance, and cost optimization. Deep expertise in AWS services including EC2, Lambda, ECS, RDS, DynamoDB, and CloudFront is required. Experience with Terraform and AWS CDK for infrastructure-as-code and knowledge of FinOps practices is highly valued. You will lead cloud migration projects, conduct architecture reviews, and mentor cloud engineers. AWS Certified Solutions Architect Professional certification is required.

We are hiring a Software Engineer with strong Java expertise to join our enterprise software team. You will design and develop backend components using Java 17, Spring Boot, and Hibernate, and integrate with Oracle and PostgreSQL databases. Experience with message-driven architectures using Apache Kafka or RabbitMQ is required. Familiarity with Docker, Jenkins for CI/CD, and basic knowledge of Kubernetes for deployment is expected. You will participate in Agile ceremonies, conduct peer code reviews, and contribute to technical design documentation. 3+ years of Java development experience in a professional environment is required.

We are looking for a Data Engineer to build and maintain our data infrastructure. You will design scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using Apache Spark, dbt, and Airflow, and manage data lakes on AWS S3 and data warehouses on Snowflake or Redshift. Strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python for pipeline development are required. Experience with streaming data ingestion using Kafka or Kinesis is a plus. You will collaborate with data scientists to provide clean, reliable datasets for model training and with business analysts to support reporting needs. 3+ years of data engineering experience is expected.

We are seeking an experienced Penetration Tester to assess the security posture of our applications and infrastructure. You will conduct black-box and white-box penetration tests on web applications, APIs, and network infrastructure, using tools such as Burp Suite, Metasploit, and Nmap. Strong knowledge of OWASP Top 10, CVE databases, and exploit development fundamentals is required. You will write comprehensive technical reports with risk ratings and remediation recommendations. Experience with cloud environments (AWS, Azure) and container security testing is a plus. OSCP or CEH certification is strongly preferred.

We are hiring a React Developer to build dynamic web interfaces for our B2B SaaS product. You will create reusable component libraries, implement responsive layouts, and integrate with RESTful and GraphQL APIs. Proficiency in React, TypeScript, and testing libraries such as Jest and React Testing Library is required. Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Docker for local development, and deployment on AWS Amplify or Vercel is a plus. You will work closely with backend engineers and UX designers to deliver high-quality features on a regular release cadence. A strong portfolio of React projects is highly valued.

We are seeking an MLOps Engineer to streamline the deployment and monitoring of machine learning models in production. You will build ML pipelines using Kubeflow or MLflow, manage model registries, and automate retraining workflows triggered by data drift. Strong experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms such as AWS SageMaker or GCP Vertex AI is required. Proficiency in Python and familiarity with CI/CD tools like GitLab CI and Jenkins is expected. You will collaborate with data scientists to define model serving strategies and with DevOps teams on infrastructure reliability. 3+ years in MLOps or ML infrastructure roles is preferred.

We are looking for an Information Security Analyst to strengthen our security operations. You will analyze threat intelligence feeds, investigate security alerts in Splunk, and coordinate incident response activities. Experience with endpoint detection tools, firewall rule management, and network traffic analysis using Wireshark is required. You will conduct security awareness training, perform risk assessments, and support compliance audits for SOC 2 and ISO 27001 frameworks. Familiarity with scripting in Python or PowerShell for security automation is a strong plus. CompTIA Security+ or CISM certification is preferred.

We are hiring a Senior Cloud Engineer to lead our Azure infrastructure initiatives. You will architect and deploy cloud solutions using Azure services including AKS, Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, Service Bus, and Azure Monitor. Deep knowledge of ARM templates, Bicep, and Terraform for infrastructure-as-code is required. Experience with Azure DevOps pipelines, networking concepts, and hybrid cloud connectivity via ExpressRoute is expected. You will define governance policies, manage cost budgets, and provide technical leadership to a team of cloud engineers. Azure Solutions Architect Expert certification is strongly preferred.

We are seeking a Systems Analyst to analyze and optimize our enterprise IT systems. You will gather requirements from stakeholders, document AS-IS and TO-BE process flows, and work with developers to implement system changes. Proficiency in SQL for data analysis and reporting, and experience with ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle is required. Familiarity with JIRA for project tracking and MS Visio or Lucidchart for process diagrams is expected. You will liaise between business units and IT teams to ensure solutions meet functional requirements and business objectives. Strong analytical and communication skills are essential.

We are looking for a Python Software Engineer to develop backend services and data pipelines for our analytics platform. You will build RESTful APIs using FastAPI or Flask, design database schemas in PostgreSQL, and integrate with third-party services via webhooks and event queues. Experience with asynchronous programming, Celery for task queues, and Redis for caching is required. Familiarity with Docker and deployment on AWS using ECS or Lambda is a strong plus. You will write comprehensive tests using pytest and participate in regular code reviews and architecture discussions. 2–4 years of Python development experience expected.

We are hiring a Computer Vision Engineer to develop image and video analysis solutions. You will design and train deep learning models for object detection, image segmentation, and facial recognition using PyTorch and OpenCV. Experience with transfer learning, data augmentation, and model quantization for edge deployment is required. You will deploy models as APIs using FastAPI and Docker, and optimize inference performance on GPU hardware. Familiarity with MLflow for experiment tracking and AWS for cloud-based training pipelines is a plus. A portfolio of CV projects or published research is highly valued.

We are seeking a DevOps Engineer specializing in CI/CD to accelerate our software delivery process. You will design and maintain pipelines in GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and Jenkins, and manage artifact repositories in JFrog Artifactory or Nexus. Strong experience with Docker, Helm, and Kubernetes for containerized deployments is required. You will implement automated testing gates, manage secrets with HashiCorp Vault, and monitor pipelines with Datadog. Experience with Terraform for cloud provisioning on AWS is expected. You will mentor development teams on CI/CD best practices and DevSecOps principles. 3+ years of relevant experience required.

We are looking for a Web Developer with e-commerce experience to build and maintain our Shopify-based online store. You will customize Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and develop custom apps using the Shopify API and Node.js. Experience with React for headless commerce implementations and GraphQL for Shopify Storefront API queries is a plus. You will integrate third-party tools for payments, analytics, and marketing automation, and optimize site performance for Core Web Vitals. Familiarity with A/B testing frameworks and SEO best practices is expected. 2+ years of Shopify development experience required.

We are hiring a Senior Business Analyst with a financial services background to support digital banking projects. You will lead requirements gathering workshops, produce detailed functional and non-functional specifications, and manage traceability matrices. Strong knowledge of financial products, regulatory frameworks such as PSD2 and GDPR, and experience with core banking systems is required. Proficiency in SQL and data analysis, and familiarity with BI tools like Tableau or Qlik is expected. You will present complex findings to senior stakeholders and act as the liaison between business and IT delivery teams. CBAP certification is a strong advantage.

We are seeking a Kubernetes Administrator to manage and scale our container orchestration platform. You will maintain multi-cluster Kubernetes environments, manage workloads using Helm, and configure networking with Istio service mesh. Strong knowledge of Kubernetes internals, RBAC, persistent storage, and resource management is required. Experience with monitoring using Prometheus and Grafana, and logging with ELK stack is expected. You will troubleshoot production incidents, apply security hardening, and contribute to platform automation using Python or Go. CKA or CKS certification is preferred. 4+ years of Kubernetes administration experience required.

We are looking for a Junior Machine Learning Engineer eager to build ML solutions in a collaborative team. You will assist in preparing datasets, training classification and regression models using scikit-learn and TensorFlow, and evaluating model performance. Basic experience with Python, Pandas, and NumPy is required. Exposure to Git and version control workflows is expected. You will shadow senior ML engineers in designing pipelines and learn deployment workflows using Docker and AWS. A strong academic background in computer science, mathematics, or statistics and hands-on project experience with ML are highly valued. This is a growth-oriented role.

We are hiring a Data Warehouse Engineer to design and maintain our enterprise data warehouse. You will develop dimensional data models, build ELT pipelines using dbt and Python, and manage our Snowflake and Redshift environments. Strong SQL optimization skills and experience with large-scale data ingestion are required. Familiarity with Airflow for workflow orchestration and Kafka for streaming ingestion is a plus. You will collaborate with BI developers and data scientists to ensure data quality, timeliness, and governance. Experience with Terraform for cloud infrastructure and knowledge of GDPR data handling requirements are expected.

We are seeking an Application Security Engineer to embed security throughout our software development lifecycle. You will perform SAST and DAST scans using tools like SonarQube and OWASP ZAP, conduct threat modeling sessions, and provide secure code review guidance to development teams. Strong knowledge of web application vulnerabilities, authentication protocols (OAuth 2.0, SAML), and API security is required. Experience with DevSecOps pipelines integrating security tooling into CI/CD workflows is expected. Familiarity with cloud security on AWS and container security scanning tools like Trivy is a plus. OSCP or GWEB certification preferred.

We are looking for a Software Architect to define technical strategy and guide engineering teams in building scalable, maintainable systems. You will create architectural blueprints for microservices and event-driven architectures, conduct technology evaluations, and establish coding and design standards. Deep expertise in distributed systems, API design, and cloud platforms such as AWS or GCP is required. Strong hands-on skills in Java or Python and experience with Kafka, gRPC, and service mesh technologies are expected. You will mentor senior engineers, lead architecture review boards, and collaborate with product leadership. 8+ years of engineering experience including 3+ in architecture roles.

We are hiring an Azure Data Engineer to build and manage our cloud-based data platform. You will design and implement data pipelines using Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, and PySpark, and manage data lakes on Azure Data Lake Storage. Proficiency in SQL and Python for data transformation, and experience with Delta Lake format is required. You will configure monitoring and alerting using Azure Monitor and Log Analytics, and enforce data governance using Microsoft Purview. Experience with CI/CD for data pipelines using Azure DevOps is a plus. DP-203 or equivalent Azure Data Engineer certification is preferred.

We are seeking an Embedded Systems Engineer to develop firmware for IoT and industrial devices. You will write low-level C and C++ code for microcontrollers, design communication protocols using UART, SPI, and I2C, and integrate RTOS systems such as FreeRTOS. Experience with debugging tools such as JTAG/SWD and oscilloscopes is required. Familiarity with Python scripting for test automation and experience with CI/CD pipelines for firmware builds is a plus. You will collaborate with hardware engineers on PCB design reviews and with cloud teams on MQTT-based IoT connectivity. 3+ years of embedded development experience expected.

We are looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer to lead our infrastructure reliability and automation efforts. You will architect CI/CD pipelines, manage multi-region AWS deployments, and drive adoption of infrastructure-as-code using Terraform and CDK. Deep expertise in Kubernetes, Docker, and service mesh technologies like Istio is required. You will lead incident reviews, define SLIs/SLOs, and champion observability using Datadog and OpenTelemetry. Experience with security scanning in pipelines and cost optimization strategies for AWS is expected. You will mentor junior DevOps engineers and collaborate with engineering leadership. 6+ years of DevOps or infrastructure engineering experience required.

We are seeking an NLP Data Scientist to develop text analytics solutions for our customer intelligence platform. You will build models for sentiment analysis, topic modeling, and intent detection using Python, spaCy, and Hugging Face Transformers. Experience with text preprocessing, feature extraction (TF-IDF, embeddings), and evaluation of NLP pipelines is required. Familiarity with SQL, Pandas, and cloud storage on AWS S3 for managing large text corpora is expected. You will design experiments, track results using MLflow, and communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders. A background in NLP, computational linguistics, or AI research is strongly preferred.

We are hiring a Cloud Network Engineer to design and manage network infrastructure across our AWS and GCP environments. You will configure VPCs, subnets, transit gateways, and Direct Connect links, and implement network security controls such as security groups and WAF rules. Strong knowledge of BGP, DNS, and load balancing using ALB and NLB is required. Experience with network automation using Python and Terraform is expected. You will monitor network performance using CloudWatch and resolve complex connectivity and latency issues. A background in enterprise networking (CCNP or equivalent) combined with cloud experience is highly valued.

We are looking for a Junior Web Developer to join our frontend team and help build engaging web experiences. You will write clean HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, implement designs from Figma mockups, and assist in building React components. Familiarity with Git for version control and basic REST API consumption is required. Exposure to responsive design principles and cross-browser testing is expected. You will receive mentorship from senior developers and have opportunities to learn modern frontend tooling including Webpack and Vite. A strong portfolio of personal or academic web projects will make your application stand out. Entry-level candidates are welcome.

We are seeking a SOC Analyst to monitor and respond to security threats in our 24/7 Security Operations Center. You will analyze alerts from SIEM platforms including Splunk and Microsoft Sentinel, triage incidents, and escalate high-severity threats. Strong knowledge of attack frameworks such as MITRE ATT&CK, and experience with network traffic analysis and log investigation is required. Familiarity with endpoint protection tools like CrowdStrike Falcon and vulnerability scanners such as Qualys is a plus. You will document incident timelines, support forensic investigations, and contribute to improving detection rules. Shift work required. CompTIA CySA+ or equivalent is preferred.

We are looking for a Data Science Manager to lead a team of data scientists and analysts. You will define the team's roadmap, prioritize ML initiatives aligned with business strategy, and ensure technical quality of models in production. Deep hands-on expertise in Python, machine learning, and statistical modeling is required alongside strong people management skills. Experience with cloud-based ML platforms such as AWS SageMaker or Databricks, and familiarity with MLOps best practices is expected. You will present insights and model outcomes to the executive team and work cross-functionally with product, engineering, and marketing. 7+ years in data science with 2+ in management required.

We are hiring a Vue.js Developer to build and maintain our customer portal web application. You will develop interactive UI components using Vue 3 and Pinia, integrate with RESTful and GraphQL APIs, and write unit tests using Vitest. Strong knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript, CSS frameworks like Tailwind CSS, and component-driven development is required. Experience with build tools such as Vite and deployment workflows using Docker and GitLab CI is a plus. You will participate in design reviews using Figma and contribute to the front-end architecture decisions. 2+ years of Vue.js or similar framework development experience is expected.

We are seeking a Business Intelligence Developer to design and build analytical solutions for our organization. You will create complex SQL queries, develop dimensional models, and build interactive dashboards in Power BI and Tableau. Experience with Snowflake or BigQuery as the underlying data platform is required. Familiarity with DAX for Power BI measures and experience with Python for data preparation tasks is a plus. You will liaise with business stakeholders to gather reporting requirements and ensure data accuracy and consistency. Knowledge of data governance best practices and experience with dbt for model documentation is valued.

We are hiring a Site Reliability Engineer with GCP expertise to ensure availability of our cloud-native services. You will manage GKE clusters, configure Cloud Run and Cloud Functions, and build observability pipelines using Cloud Monitoring and Cloud Logging. Strong experience with Terraform for GCP infrastructure provisioning and familiarity with GCP networking is required. You will define error budgets, build automated runbooks, and drive blameless post-mortems. Proficiency in Go or Python for SRE tooling, and experience with SLO-based alerting frameworks are expected. GCP Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer certification is a plus.

We are seeking a Cybersecurity Architect to design and govern our enterprise security architecture. You will define zero-trust network architectures, develop security reference models, and assess technology choices against security standards such as NIST CSF and ISO 27001. Deep expertise in identity and access management, PKI, encryption, and cloud security on AWS and Azure is required. You will lead security design reviews, produce threat models using STRIDE methodology, and work with engineering leadership to balance security with business agility. CISSP or SABSA certification is strongly preferred. 8+ years of information security experience with at least 3 in architecture roles required.

We are looking for a Software Engineer with strong .NET expertise to develop enterprise applications. You will design and build web APIs using C# and ASP.NET Core, integrate with SQL Server and Azure SQL databases, and develop event-driven workflows using Azure Service Bus. Experience with Entity Framework Core, Dependency Injection patterns, and unit testing with xUnit is required. Familiarity with Docker and deployment on Azure App Service or AKS is expected. You will participate in Agile sprints, conduct code reviews, and contribute to improving code quality standards. 3+ years of .NET development experience in a professional setting is required.

We are hiring a Reinforcement Learning Engineer to develop autonomous decision-making systems. You will implement and experiment with RL algorithms including PPO, SAC, and DQN using PyTorch and OpenAI Gym / Gymnasium environments. Experience with simulation environments, reward shaping, and multi-agent systems is required. Familiarity with distributed training on GPU clusters and experiment tracking using Weights & Biases is a strong plus. You will collaborate with product teams to define reward objectives and with infrastructure engineers to scale training workloads on AWS or GCP. A Master's or PhD in machine learning, robotics, or a related field is preferred.

We are seeking an IT Business Analyst with healthcare domain knowledge to support EHR implementation and integration projects. You will analyze clinical workflows, gather requirements from physicians and nursing staff, and translate them into technical specifications for development teams. Strong knowledge of HL7 FHIR standards, healthcare data models, and regulatory requirements such as HIPAA is required. Experience with project management tools like JIRA and process modeling in BPMN is expected. Proficiency in SQL for data validation and reporting is a plus. You will act as a bridge between clinical stakeholders and technology vendors. 3+ years in health IT business analysis required.

We are looking for a Cloud FinOps Analyst to help optimize our cloud spend across AWS and Azure. You will analyze billing reports, identify cost anomalies, and implement tagging strategies and budget alerts. Experience with AWS Cost Explorer, Azure Cost Management, and tools like Apptio Cloudability is required. Proficiency in SQL or Python for custom cost analysis scripts is expected. You will work with engineering and finance teams to establish showback/chargeback models and define cost governance policies. Familiarity with Terraform for rightsizing and reserved instance planning is a plus. Knowledge of FinOps Foundation framework is highly valued.

We are seeking a Data Analyst to support decision-making across multiple business functions. You will write complex SQL queries against our Snowflake data warehouse, build dashboards in Looker and Google Data Studio, and perform exploratory data analysis using Python and Pandas. Strong analytical thinking and the ability to communicate data insights clearly to non-technical audiences is required. Experience with data cleaning, handling missing values, and applying basic statistical methods is expected. You will partner with product managers, marketing, and finance teams to define metrics and automate recurring reports. 2+ years of data analysis experience required.

We are hiring a Backend API Developer to design and implement APIs powering our mobile and web applications. You will build RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Node.js and TypeScript, design schemas in PostgreSQL, and implement caching using Redis. Experience with authentication using OAuth 2.0 and JWT, and rate limiting and API gateway patterns is required. Familiarity with AWS Lambda and API Gateway for serverless deployments is a plus. You will write API documentation using OpenAPI/Swagger and maintain high code coverage using Jest and Supertest. 3+ years of backend Node.js development experience is expected.

We are seeking a GCP Data Engineer to build robust data pipelines on Google Cloud Platform. You will design and deploy batch and streaming pipelines using Dataflow, Pub/Sub, and BigQuery, and orchestrate workflows with Cloud Composer (Airflow). Strong experience with SQL, Python, and Apache Beam is required. Familiarity with dbt for data transformation and Terraform for infrastructure-as-code on GCP is expected. You will implement data quality checks, manage access controls using IAM, and optimize BigQuery query performance. Experience with streaming analytics and event-driven architectures is a strong plus. GCP Professional Data Engineer certification is preferred.

We are looking for a motivated Junior DevOps Engineer to join our infrastructure team. You will assist in maintaining CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions, manage Docker containers, and support deployments on AWS EC2 and ECS. Basic knowledge of Linux command line, Git workflows, and familiarity with Terraform is required. Willingness to learn Kubernetes and monitoring tools like Prometheus and Grafana is expected. You will support on-call rotations, document runbooks, and collaborate with development teams to troubleshoot deployment issues. This is an excellent entry-level opportunity for someone passionate about automation and infrastructure. A CS degree or equivalent experience is required.

We are seeking a Senior NLP Engineer to lead development of language AI features across our product suite. You will fine-tune and evaluate large language models using Hugging Face, build production-grade NLP pipelines for tasks like relation extraction, summarization, and dialogue systems. Deep expertise in transformer architectures, RLHF, and prompt engineering is required. Strong Python skills and experience with model serving using TorchServe or Triton Inference Server are expected. You will lead a small team of NLP engineers, define technical roadmaps, and collaborate with ML platform and product teams. 5+ years of NLP engineering with at least 1 LLM fine-tuning project in production required.

We are hiring an Angular Developer to build enterprise web applications for our internal tooling platform. You will develop components and modules using Angular 17 and TypeScript, consume REST APIs, and implement state management with NgRx. Strong knowledge of RxJS, Angular Material, and responsive CSS layout is required. Experience with Jest for unit testing and Cypress for end-to-end testing is expected. Familiarity with Docker for containerized local development and CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps is a plus. You will collaborate with backend engineers and UX designers in a cross-functional Agile team. 3+ years of Angular development experience is required.

We are looking for a Threat Intelligence Analyst to support our cyber defense strategy. You will collect and analyze threat data from open-source and commercial intelligence feeds, produce actionable intelligence reports, and brief the security leadership team. Proficiency in tools like MISP, Anomali, or Recorded Future is required. Experience with scripting in Python for data collection and enrichment automation is expected. You will correlate threat actor TTPs using the MITRE ATT&CK framework, support purple team exercises, and collaborate with the SOC on detection improvements. Knowledge of geopolitics and industry-specific threat landscapes is a plus. 3+ years in threat intelligence or related security role required.

We are hiring a Machine Learning Platform Engineer to build infrastructure that accelerates data science productivity. You will develop self-service tools for model training, experiment tracking, and deployment using MLflow, Kubeflow, and Seldon. Strong experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and Python is required. Familiarity with distributed training (Ray, Spark MLlib), GPU resource management, and model monitoring for data drift detection is expected. You will collaborate with data scientists to understand pain points and translate them into platform features. Experience with AWS SageMaker or GCP Vertex AI pipelines is a significant advantage. 4+ years in ML infrastructure or MLOps roles preferred.

We are seeking an IT Project Business Analyst to support the delivery of large-scale digital transformation programs. You will create business requirement documents, data flow diagrams, and user stories aligned to project milestones. Proficiency in JIRA and Confluence, and experience with stakeholder management at all levels of the organization is required. Knowledge of Agile and Waterfall methodologies, and ability to switch between them based on project needs is expected. SQL skills for data validation and experience with Microsoft Visio for process documentation are a plus. You will manage change requests, support UAT, and ensure deliverables meet acceptance criteria. PMP or PRINCE2 certification is advantageous.

We are looking for a developer to contribute to our internal Kubernetes platform product. You will build Kubernetes operators and custom controllers using Go, develop Helm chart libraries, and maintain platform APIs consumed by application teams. Deep knowledge of Kubernetes API machinery, CRDs, and admission webhooks is required. Experience with testing frameworks like Ginkgo and integration with CI/CD using GitHub Actions is expected. You will document platform capabilities, conduct onboarding sessions for engineering teams, and contribute to open-source Kubernetes tooling. Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS EKS, GCP GKE, or Azure AKS) is highly valued.

We are seeking a Full Stack JavaScript Engineer to build features across our entire product stack. You will develop backend services using Node.js and Express with PostgreSQL, and build React frontends with TypeScript. Experience with GraphQL, REST API design, and real-time communication using WebSockets is required. Familiarity with Docker, AWS deployment using Elastic Beanstalk or ECS, and monitoring with CloudWatch is expected. You will contribute to architectural decisions, write tests using Jest and Cypress, and work in a collaborative startup environment where ownership and initiative are valued. 3–5 years of full-stack JavaScript experience is required.

We are hiring a Deep Learning Engineer to develop state-of-the-art models for our AI product portfolio. You will design and train models for tasks including image classification, object detection, and sequence modeling using PyTorch and ONNX. Strong knowledge of CNN, RNN, LSTM, and transformer architectures is required. Experience with model compression, quantization, and deployment to edge devices or via TensorRT is a plus. You will run large-scale training experiments on multi-GPU clusters, track experiments with Weights & Biases, and collaborate with product teams to optimize model accuracy versus latency. A Master's or PhD in deep learning or related field is preferred.

We are looking for an Information Systems Business Analyst to support ERP and CRM implementations. You will analyze existing business processes, document requirements, and configure Salesforce CRM and SAP ERP modules. Strong understanding of data flows, system integrations, and API-based connectivity is required. Proficiency in SQL for data migration validation and experience with JIRA for tracking implementation tasks are expected. You will lead user training sessions, develop test cases for UAT, and maintain post-implementation support documentation. Knowledge of Agile delivery methodology and experience with cloud-based ERP/CRM systems is highly valued.

We are seeking a Software Engineer with deep expertise in caching and real-time data systems. You will design caching strategies using Redis and Memcached, develop high-throughput event streaming pipelines with Apache Kafka, and build low-latency microservices in Go or Java. Experience with distributed systems, consistency models, and database query optimization in PostgreSQL is required. Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS deployment is expected. You will optimize system performance, write load tests using k6 or Gatling, and participate in capacity planning discussions. 4+ years of backend engineering with a focus on performance-critical systems is required.

We are hiring a Security Engineer focused on DevSecOps to integrate security into our software delivery pipeline. You will implement SAST tools like Checkmarx, SCA tools like Snyk, and container scanning using Trivy in CI/CD pipelines. Strong knowledge of secure coding practices, OWASP guidelines, and secrets management using HashiCorp Vault is required. Experience with cloud security posture management (CSPM) tools and AWS Security Hub is expected. You will work with development teams to remediate vulnerabilities, conduct threat modeling, and define secure-by-default infrastructure patterns. 3+ years in application or DevSecOps security engineering required.

We are looking for a Senior Web Developer with PHP and Laravel expertise to lead backend development of our web platform. You will architect and develop RESTful APIs using Laravel, design complex database schemas in MySQL, and implement job queues with Laravel Horizon and Redis. Experience with Docker, Nginx, and deployment on AWS EC2 or Lightsail is required. Strong knowledge of object-oriented PHP, SOLID principles, and PHPUnit for testing is expected. You will mentor junior developers, perform code reviews, and contribute to architectural decisions. Familiarity with Vue.js or React for frontend integration is a valuable plus. 5+ years of PHP development experience required.

We are seeking a Cloud Cost Optimization Engineer to reduce and govern cloud spend across AWS, Azure, and GCP. You will analyze usage patterns, implement rightsizing recommendations, and develop automated cleanup scripts using Python and Terraform. Experience with AWS Cost Explorer, Savings Plans, and Reserved Instances strategy is required. Familiarity with tools like Apptio Cloudability or CloudHealth is a plus. You will collaborate with engineering teams to embed cost awareness, define tagging standards, and produce monthly cost reports for leadership. Knowledge of FinOps Foundation principles and container resource management in Kubernetes is highly valued.

We are offering a Data Science Internship for students or recent graduates eager to apply their skills in a commercial environment. You will assist the data science team with data cleaning using Python and Pandas, exploratory data analysis, and building prototype machine learning models using scikit-learn. Basic knowledge of SQL, NumPy, and familiarity with Jupyter Notebooks is required. Exposure to visualization libraries like Matplotlib and Seaborn is a plus. You will participate in team meetings, contribute to research on new modeling techniques, and present findings. This role offers hands-on experience with real-world datasets and mentorship from experienced data scientists. Current enrollment in a CS, Statistics, or related degree is required.

We are hiring a Software Engineer experienced in Go to build high-performance backend services. You will design and implement distributed microservices using Go, gRPC, and Protocol Buffers, and integrate with Apache Kafka for event streaming. Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis, and proficiency in Docker and Kubernetes for service deployment is required. You will write comprehensive unit and integration tests, participate in architecture reviews, and contribute to internal developer tooling. Familiarity with observability practices using OpenTelemetry and Jaeger for distributed tracing is expected. 3+ years of Go development in a production environment is required. Open source contributions to Go projects are a plus.

We are seeking a Prompt Engineer and AI Specialist to optimize interactions with large language models across our product suite. You will design, test, and iterate on prompts for GPT-4 and Claude models to improve output quality for tasks such as summarization, classification, and code generation. Experience with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures is required. Proficiency in Python and familiarity with vector databases such as Pinecone or Weaviate is expected. You will evaluate LLM outputs using quantitative metrics and human-in-the-loop feedback frameworks. A background in NLP, linguistics, or machine learning is strongly preferred.

We are looking for a Solutions Architect with deep AWS expertise to support pre-sales and customer onboarding activities. You will design bespoke cloud architectures for enterprise clients, produce detailed architecture documents and cost estimates, and present solutions at executive level. Deep knowledge of AWS services including EC2, RDS, EKS, Lambda, CloudFront, and Direct Connect is required. Experience with Terraform for infrastructure-as-code and familiarity with cloud migration frameworks (6 Rs) is expected. You will work closely with sales, customer success, and professional services teams. Excellent communication and presentation skills are essential. AWS Certified Solutions Architect Professional is required.

We are hiring a Data Governance Analyst to establish and maintain our data governance framework. You will define data quality standards, manage metadata in a data catalog (Collibra or Alation), and work with data owners to classify sensitive data under GDPR and CCPA requirements. Proficiency in SQL for data quality checks and experience with data lineage tools is required. Familiarity with cloud data platforms such as Snowflake or BigQuery and basic Python scripting for automation are a plus. You will facilitate data stewardship committees, produce data quality scorecards, and provide guidance on master data management. 3+ years in data governance or data management roles is required.

We are seeking a skilled iOS Developer to build and maintain our consumer mobile application. You will develop features using Swift and SwiftUI, consume RESTful APIs, and implement local data persistence using Core Data and CloudKit. Experience with Combine for reactive programming, XCTest for unit and UI testing, and App Store submission processes is required. Familiarity with CI/CD using Fastlane and GitHub Actions, and basic knowledge of backend services and AWS is a plus. You will collaborate with Android and backend engineers to ensure feature parity, and with UX designers using Figma. 3+ years of iOS development experience with at least one published App Store application is required.

We are looking for an AI Ethics and Model Risk Analyst to ensure responsible and compliant use of machine learning across our organization. You will conduct model risk assessments, evaluate models for bias and fairness using tools like Fairlearn and IBM AI Fairness 360, and maintain model risk documentation aligned with SR 11-7 and EU AI Act guidelines. Experience with Python, statistical modeling concepts, and risk management frameworks is required. Familiarity with LLM evaluation practices and data privacy regulations is expected. You will collaborate with data science, legal, and compliance teams to embed ethical AI principles into the model development lifecycle.

We are seeking a Terraform Engineer to own and evolve our infrastructure-as-code practice. You will write, review, and refactor Terraform modules for AWS and Azure resources, manage state backends using Terraform Cloud or S3, and implement policy-as-code with Open Policy Agent (OPA) and Sentinel. Strong knowledge of Terraform best practices including module design, workspace management, and version pinning is required. Experience with CI/CD integration for Terraform pipelines and familiarity with Ansible for configuration management is expected. You will mentor developers on IaC practices and contribute to improving infrastructure standards. 3+ years of Terraform engineering experience required.

We are hiring a Mobile Backend Engineer to build APIs and services that power our iOS and Android applications. You will develop high-performance REST APIs using Python (FastAPI) or Java (Spring Boot), design schemas in PostgreSQL, and implement push notification services using Firebase and APNs. Experience with caching using Redis, API gateway configuration on AWS API Gateway, and authentication via OAuth 2.0 / JWT is required. You will collaborate closely with mobile frontend teams to design contract-first APIs, and with DevOps to ensure reliable deployments on AWS ECS. 3+ years of backend development experience with mobile API focus is required.

We are seeking a Cloud Compliance Engineer to ensure our AWS and Azure environments adhere to regulatory and internal security standards. You will implement compliance controls mapped to SOC 2, ISO 27001, and PCI-DSS, configure AWS Config Rules and Azure Policy for continuous compliance monitoring, and produce audit reports. Strong understanding of cloud security architecture, IAM, and encryption standards is required. Experience with compliance automation tools such as Chef InSpec or AWS Security Hub is expected. Proficiency in Python for compliance scripting and Terraform for remediation automation is a plus. CISA or CCSP certification is preferred. 4+ years in cloud or IT compliance roles required.

We are looking for a Senior Angular Developer to lead frontend development of our enterprise data platform UI. You will architect and implement large-scale Angular applications, establish component library standards, and mentor junior frontend engineers. Expert knowledge of Angular 16+, TypeScript, RxJS, and NgRx state management is required. Experience with micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation, and performance optimization using lazy loading and OnPush change detection is expected. Familiarity with Docker and Azure DevOps for CI/CD is a plus. You will collaborate with backend and UX teams to deliver high-quality, accessible interfaces. 5+ years of Angular development experience is required.

We are hiring a Principal Data Engineer to lead data platform strategy and execution. You will define technical standards for data ingestion, transformation, and serving layers, and lead a team of 4–6 data engineers. Deep expertise in Spark, Kafka, Airflow, dbt, and cloud data warehouses such as Snowflake or Databricks is required. Strong Python and SQL skills and experience with building real-time analytics pipelines are expected. You will drive adoption of DataOps practices, implement data observability using tools like Monte Carlo or Great Expectations, and collaborate with data science and business intelligence teams. 7+ years of data engineering experience including team leadership is required.

We are seeking a GCP Cloud Architect to lead design and governance of our Google Cloud Platform environment. You will define multi-project architectures, implement shared VPC and Interconnect configurations, and establish security baselines using Cloud Armor and IAM policies. Deep knowledge of GCP services including GKE, Cloud Run, BigQuery, Cloud Spanner, and Pub/Sub is required. Experience with Terraform for GCP provisioning and familiarity with CI/CD using Cloud Build is expected. You will produce reference architectures, lead architecture review boards, and mentor cloud engineers. GCP Professional Cloud Architect certification is required. 6+ years of cloud architecture experience.

We are looking for a Data Scientist specializing in fraud detection to build models that protect our payments platform. You will develop anomaly detection and binary classification models using gradient boosting (XGBoost, LightGBM) and neural networks in Python. Experience with imbalanced datasets, feature engineering for transactional data, and evaluation metrics like precision-recall and AUC is required. Familiarity with real-time model serving on AWS SageMaker and monitoring model performance drift is expected. You will collaborate with fraud operations teams to understand patterns and incorporate domain knowledge into models. Experience in financial services or payments fraud analytics is strongly preferred.

We are seeking a Platform Business Analyst to support product and engineering teams delivering our core B2B SaaS platform. You will write detailed user stories, create mockups using Figma or Balsamiq, and maintain the product backlog in JIRA. Strong communication skills and experience facilitating discovery workshops with enterprise customers are required. Proficiency in SQL for analyzing product usage data and familiarity with analytics tools like Mixpanel or Amplitude is a plus. You will define acceptance criteria, support QA testing, and track post-release outcomes against defined KPIs. A background in SaaS product companies and Agile development environments is strongly preferred.

We are hiring a Rust Software Engineer to develop performance-critical systems and tooling. You will build memory-safe, high-throughput services in Rust, contribute to internal libraries, and integrate with C and C++ codebases via FFI. Strong understanding of Rust ownership model, async programming using Tokio, and systems programming concepts is required. Experience with building CLI tools, WebAssembly modules, or networking applications in Rust is a plus. You will collaborate with platform and infrastructure teams, write comprehensive documentation, and participate in design reviews. Contributions to open-source Rust projects are highly valued. 2+ years of professional Rust development experience is required.

We are seeking an IAM Engineer to design and implement identity solutions across our enterprise and cloud environments. You will manage Okta and Azure AD configurations, implement SSO using SAML and OIDC, and design RBAC and ABAC policies for AWS and Azure resources. Experience with Privileged Access Management (PAM) solutions such as CyberArk, and directory services including Active Directory and LDAP, is required. Familiarity with scripting using Python or PowerShell for IAM automation is expected. You will lead IAM audits, support SOC 2 compliance reviews, and work closely with security operations and IT teams. 3+ years in IAM engineering is required.

We are looking for a Python Data Engineer with Apache Spark experience to build large-scale data processing systems. You will develop Spark jobs in PySpark for batch and micro-batch processing, manage workflows in Apache Airflow, and load data into Snowflake and Delta Lake. Strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python are required. Experience with cloud storage on AWS S3 or Azure ADLS, and familiarity with streaming using Kafka or Kinesis is expected. You will implement unit tests for pipelines, manage schema evolution, and collaborate with data scientists and analysts to deliver reliable, high-quality data products. 3+ years of data engineering with Spark experience is required.

We are hiring a Web Developer with headless CMS experience to build content-driven web applications. You will integrate Contentful or Strapi CMS with a Next.js frontend, implement static site generation and incremental static regeneration patterns, and consume GraphQL and REST content APIs. Strong knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript, React, and web performance optimization is required. Experience with CDN configuration using Cloudflare or AWS CloudFront and familiarity with SEO best practices for headless architectures is expected. You will collaborate with content teams and marketing stakeholders to implement content models and publishing workflows. 2+ years of Next.js and headless CMS development experience is required.

We are seeking a Generative AI Engineer to build AI-powered product features using large language models. You will design and implement RAG pipelines using LangChain and LlamaIndex, integrate with OpenAI and Anthropic APIs, and deploy AI microservices on AWS using FastAPI and Docker. Experience with vector databases such as Pinecone or Chroma and prompt engineering for production use cases is required. Strong Python skills and familiarity with evaluation frameworks for LLM outputs are expected. You will collaborate with product managers to define AI feature requirements and with ML engineers on fine-tuning and model selection decisions. 2+ years of applied LLM or generative AI engineering experience required.

We are looking for an IT Operations Analyst to support and improve our enterprise IT environment. You will manage ticketing workflows in ServiceNow, perform root cause analysis on incidents, and support configuration management activities using CMDB. Experience with Windows Server and Linux administration, Active Directory management, and basic networking troubleshooting is required. Familiarity with monitoring tools such as Nagios, Zabbix, or Datadog is a plus. You will document processes, assist in IT audits, and contribute to the improvement of ITIL-aligned service management processes. ITIL v4 Foundation certification is preferred. Strong communication and organizational skills are essential.

We are hiring a Streaming Data Engineer to build real-time data infrastructure. You will design and operate Kafka clusters, develop stream processing applications using Apache Flink or Spark Structured Streaming in Python and Scala, and integrate with downstream systems including BigQuery and Elasticsearch. Strong understanding of event-driven architectures, at-least-once and exactly-once processing semantics, and schema management with Confluent Schema Registry is required. Experience with Kubernetes for deploying streaming applications and monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana is expected. You will collaborate with product and analytics teams to deliver sub-second analytics pipelines. 4+ years of data engineering with streaming experience required.

We are seeking a Mobile Security Analyst to assess and improve the security of our iOS and Android applications. You will perform dynamic and static analysis of mobile apps using MobSF, Frida, and Charles Proxy, and identify vulnerabilities such as insecure data storage, improper authentication, and insufficient transport layer security. Experience with OWASP Mobile Top 10 and hands-on experience with both iOS and Android security models is required. Familiarity with reverse engineering tools and scripting in Python for automation is expected. You will produce detailed vulnerability reports, support development teams in remediation, and contribute to secure mobile development guidelines. 3+ years in mobile or application security is required.

We are looking for a Database Administrator to manage and optimize our production database environments. You will administer PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Oracle databases, manage backups and disaster recovery procedures, and tune query performance. Experience with database replication, high-availability configurations, and capacity planning is required. Familiarity with cloud-managed databases including AWS RDS, Aurora, and Azure SQL is expected. You will collaborate with developers on schema design, enforce data security policies, and support compliance activities. Proficiency in shell scripting and Python for automation of routine DBA tasks is a plus. 4+ years of database administration experience in a production environment is required.

We are hiring a Senior Business Intelligence Analyst to lead analytics and reporting initiatives. You will design and build semantic data models in dbt, develop advanced Tableau and Power BI dashboards, and define KPI frameworks for multiple business units. Expert SQL skills and experience with Snowflake or Redshift as the data platform are required. Strong stakeholder management skills and the ability to translate ambiguous business questions into analytical solutions are essential. Experience with Python for statistical analysis and familiarity with Agile ways of working in a data team are a plus. You will mentor junior analysts and lead data quality governance activities. 5+ years of BI or analytics experience required.

We are seeking a DevOps Engineer with strong configuration management skills to automate our infrastructure provisioning and operations. You will write and maintain Ansible playbooks for OS hardening, application deployment, and patch management, and develop Terraform modules for AWS infrastructure. Experience with Jenkins for pipeline automation, Vault for secrets management, and familiarity with AWS services including EC2, IAM, and VPC is required. You will collaborate with security teams to enforce compliance standards and with application teams to streamline environment provisioning. Strong Linux administration skills and Python scripting proficiency are expected. 3+ years of DevOps engineering with Ansible and Terraform experience required.

We are seeking an AI/ML Product Manager to define and execute the roadmap for our machine learning product portfolio. You will work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, and business stakeholders to identify high-value ML use cases, write detailed product requirements, and prioritize the model development backlog. Familiarity with core ML concepts including supervised learning, NLP, and model evaluation metrics is required. Experience with tools like JIRA, Confluence, and data analysis using SQL or Python is expected. You will define success metrics, manage experiment outcomes, and communicate model performance to executive stakeholders. A background in data science or ML engineering transitioning into product is highly valued.

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer with expertise in distributed systems to tackle complex scalability and reliability challenges. You will design fault-tolerant, high-throughput systems using Java and Go, architect event-driven services with Apache Kafka, and implement consensus mechanisms and distributed transactions. Deep understanding of CAP theorem, eventual consistency, and distributed tracing using Jaeger or Zipkin is required. Experience with Kubernetes for orchestration and AWS for cloud deployment is essential. You will mentor engineers, lead technical design sessions, and contribute to engineering blog posts. 6+ years of software engineering with a focus on distributed or backend systems is required.

We are hiring a Cloud Machine Learning Engineer to build and scale ML workloads on cloud infrastructure. You will develop training pipelines using SageMaker or Vertex AI, deploy models as REST APIs behind API Gateway, and implement model monitoring using Evidently or WhyLogs. Strong Python skills and experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow, alongside deep knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes for ML workloads, are required. You will architect feature stores using Feast, manage model artifacts in MLflow, and optimize inference costs on GPU instances. Experience with CI/CD for ML pipelines and data versioning using DVC is expected. 4+ years of ML engineering on cloud platforms required.
